title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: EO interviews Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, an insurance technology company that raised $108M Series A. The founders built their company by questioning legacy industry defaults rather than modernizing existing carriers, achieving rapid growth projected at several hundred million ARR with a claimed two-year competitive moat.
